Sports Scene

Copied

The first batch of China Media Group's ultra-high-definition broadcast vans for the Paris Summer Olympics have arrived at the French capital.

On their way to the International Broadcast Center for the Games, the vans passed by several Paris landmarks including the Arc de Triomphe and the iconic Eiffel Tower. To provide the audience with the most up-to-date, on-site Olympic coverage, CMG will construct an outdoor studio and establish news reporting locations near the Eiffel Tower. And for the first time abroad, CMG's Olympic broadcast production will be delivered entirely in 4K ultra high definition.
